nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the java_binding crate, which exposes RisingWave's Row/StreamChunk API as a JNI library and provides a demo binary for the Java binding.

nodes.name: make-java-binding.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task file defining build and demo tasks for the Java binding: generating JNI headers, building the shared library, starting/stopping the demo cluster, ingesting data, and running demo benchmarks.

nodes.name: run_demo.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that runs the Java binding demo by invoking the risingwave Java demo binary with the required JNI native library and Kafka connector JARs.
